title.en: China-to-Costa Rica BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入哥斯达黎加：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入哥斯大黎加：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Costa Rica INTECO conformity requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards referenced in project specifications, ARESEP and ICE/distributor grid-connection requirements (60 Hz, 120/240 V and 120/208 V / 277/480 V — North American convention), Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 transport requirements via Port of Limón/Moín and Port of Caldera — versus China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与哥斯达黎加INTECO合规要求、项目规格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、ARESEP和ICE/配电商并网要求（60 Hz、120/240 V及120/208 V / 277/480 V——北美惯例）、哥斯达黎加消防队消防安全安装要求、经利蒙/莫因港和卡尔德拉港的UN 38.3运输要求——对比中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與哥斯大黎加INTECO合規要求、項目規格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、ARESEP和ICE/配電商併網要求（60 Hz、120/240 V及120/208 V / 277/480 V——北美慣例）、哥斯大黎加消防隊消防安全安裝要求、經利蒙/莫因港和卡爾德拉港的UN 38.3運輸要求——對比中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INTECO conformity scope determination, ARESEP or ICE grid-connection approval, Cuerpo de Bomberos fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current INTECO/MEIC technical regulations, ARESEP quality regulations, ICE and distributor grid-connection technical specifications, Cuerpo de Bomberos fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INTECO合规范围裁定、ARESEP或ICE并网批准、哥斯达黎加消防队消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行INTECO/MEIC技术法规、ARESEP质量法规、ICE及配电商并网技术规格、消防队消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INTECO合規範圍裁定、ARESEP或ICE併網批准、哥斯大黎加消防隊消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行INTECO/MEIC技術法規、ARESEP質量法規、ICE及配電商併網技術規格、消防隊消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Costa Rica does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or a mandatory pre-market IEC 62619 certification regime. BESS projects in Costa Rica operate under project-specific international standards referenced in ARESEP quality regulations, ICE and distributor interconnection agreements, and Cuerpo de Bomberos fire-safety approvals. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Costa Rica are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance, adopted by INTECO as a voluntary national standard; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in ICE, ARESEP, or project-owner specifications; (3) Cuerpo de Bomberos de Costa Rica fire-safety installation approval, including design evidence aligned with NFPA codes as the primary fire-safety reference in Costa Rica; (4) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions, applicable at Port of Limón/Moín (Caribbean) and Port of Caldera (Pacific); and (5) 60 Hz grid reconfiguration — the most technically acute gap: Costa Rica operates at 60 Hz with 120/240 V (residential) and 120/208 V or 277/480 V (commercial/industrial), following North American convention, whereas China operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V. PCS firmware, protection relay settings, anti-islanding parameters, and frequency trip thresholds must all be reconfigured and retested for 60 Hz operation before interconnection in Costa Rica. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 evidence in project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 哥斯达黎加尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或强制性上市前IEC 62619认证制度相当。哥斯达黎加BESS项目依据ARESEP质量法规、ICE及配电商互联协议和消防队消防安全审批中引用的项目专属国际标准运作。中国BESS出口哥斯达黎加的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据——项目验收的国际预期基准，已由INTECO采纳为自愿性国家标准；（2）ICE、ARESEP或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）哥斯达黎加消防队消防安全安装审批，包括与哥斯达黎加主要消防安全参考规范NFPA规范相符的设计证据；（4）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件，适用于利蒙/莫因港（加勒比）和卡尔德拉港（太平洋）；（5）60 Hz电网重新配置——技术上最为关键的差距：哥斯达黎加遵循北美惯例运行于60 Hz，住宅120/240 V、商业/工业120/208 V或277/480 V，而中国运行于50 Hz、220/380 V。PCS固件、保护继电器设定、防孤岛参数及频率跳闸阈值均须重新配置并重新测试为60 Hz运行，方可在哥斯达黎加进行互联。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是生产基准，但在项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC 62619证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 哥斯大黎加尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或強制性上市前IEC 62619認證制度相當。哥斯大黎加BESS項目依據ARESEP質量法規、ICE及配電商互聯協議和消防隊消防安全審批中引用的項目專屬國際標準運作。中國BESS出口哥斯大黎加的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據——項目驗收的國際預期基準，已由INTECO採納為自願性國家標準；（2）ICE、ARESEP或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）哥斯大黎加消防隊消防安全安裝審批，包括與哥斯大黎加主要消防安全參考規範NFPA規範相符的設計證據；（4）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件，適用於利蒙/莫因港（加勒比）和卡爾德拉港（太平洋）；（5）60 Hz電網重新配置——技術上最為關鍵的差距：哥斯大黎加遵循北美慣例運行於60 Hz，住宅120/240 V、商業/工業120/208 V或277/480 V，而中國運行於50 Hz、220/380 V。PCS韌體、保護繼電器設定、防孤島參數及頻率跳閘閾值均須重新配置並重新測試為60 Hz運行，方可在哥斯大黎加進行互聯。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023是製造基準，但在項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC 62619證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
